productDisplayName: Belmonte Men Leather Dark Brown Wallet
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious, wallet from belmonte. While it's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityTwo main compartments with textile liningFour card slots on the left side of the wallet with a zipped pocket for coinsTwo insert pockets on either sidesSix card slots on the right in between two flaps with see through slotsOne insert pocket on the right with a press buttoned pocketBranding embossed inside the walletCareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
